jawChin.explanation: The subject's jaw displays a round contour with a face width-to-height ratio of 1.02. The chin appears prominent with a jaw angle of 87.4° — creating a softer lower facial contour.

chin.explanation: The subject's chin is long (27.0% of face height) with prominent projection. The chin is narrow (20.5% of face width) with a soft square shape. The labiomental fold shows a open angle of 172.9°, contributing to lower facial balance.
